title: Facets, Calendars, Sessions, Pagination, Search, and Infinite URL Spaces · Program Brief: Faceted Navigation Traps
summary: A finite site generates unbounded filter permutations, dates, tracking IDs, sort orders, empty searches, and repeated pagination paths. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the faceted navigation traps increment in URL-space trap detector and budget policy. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practi…
objectives: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.
Use stable tie-breakers and seeded fixtures so the same admitted graph yields a reproducible decision and report order.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-url-traps-infinite-spaces-4
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-url-traps-infinite-spaces-4.
# Case 1655: a local-server failure rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance.
# Changed case: change a robots, canonical, indexing, structured-data, or accessibility signal and retain the conflict.
def worked_scraper_url_traps_infinite_spaces_4(discovered_urls: int = 240, admitted_urls: int = 72, trap_rejections: int = 168, content_identities: int = 60, budget_breaches: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorizationworked4",
        "url1655",
        "response4dekrow",
        "treeworked41655",
        "frontier1655worked4",
        "report4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if discovered_urls < 1 or admitted_urls < 0 or trap_rejections < 0:
        return False, discovered_urls, "url-space-count"
    if admitted_urls + trap_rejections != discovered_urls:
        return False, admitted_urls, "trap-reconciliation"
    if content_identities < 1 or content_identities > admitted_urls:
        return False, content_identities, "content-yield"
    if budget_breaches > 0:
        return False, budget_breaches, "budget-breach"
    assert admitted_urls + trap_rejections == discovered_urls
    return True, trap_rejections, "bounded-url-space"

hints: For Authorized crawling and Python Sequence Faceted Navigation Traps evidence · Theory Faceted Navigati…, name the owner, authorization, stakeholder, revision, runtime, dependency, seed, URL, origin, robots, response, parser, selector, record, frontier, privacy, report, stop, recovery, and transfer boundary, Faceted Navigation Traps precondition, or invariant that must hold.

At Authorized crawling and Python Sequence Faceted Navigation Traps evidence · Theory Faceted Navigati…, trace this concrete input and predict authorization, URL admission, robots, fetch, redirect, decode, parse, extract, provenance, schedule, report, rejection, stop, rollback, recovery, and native evidence before reviewing it: A theory site-quality team handles case 3644 during a keyboard and screen-reader report review. Build deterministic Python evidence to detect faceted, calendar, session, pagination, search, and query-space traps before resource budgets fail; the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure; then change malformed markup or parser choice and preserve extraction provenance. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.

For Authorized crawling and Python Sequence Faceted Navigation Traps evidence · Theory Faceted Navigati…, challenge the documented misconception with changed-authorization, URL, robots rule, response, encoding, markup, selector, frontier, timing, session, browser, privacy, security, export, failure, recovery, and controlled owner transfer evidence: Removing duplicate query keys eliminates faceted navigation traps.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Faceted Navigation Traps model · Theory Faceted Navigatio…
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Faceted Navigation Traps: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 5263 during a privacy-minimized internal crawl. Build deterministic Python evidence to detect faceted, calendar, session, pagination, search, and query-space traps before resource budgets fail; automated findings must not claim ranking or WCAG conformance; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.

Evidence target: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Faceted Navigation Traps model · Theory Faceted Navigatio….
steps.why: Retrieval and explanation expose gaps that recognition questions can hide. For Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Faceted Navigation Traps model · Theory Faceted Navigatio…, keep Faceted Navigation Traps connected to executable Python authorization, URL, response, parse, provenance, frontier, report, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Detect repeated filter dimensions, permutations, empty states, sort variants, and low-value combinations using explicit site knowledge.
